13 / audit drawer

The beautiful layer stays traceable.

The phone view should feel calm and designed. Underneath, every claim still has receipts. The raw system prompt, user prompt, evidence, model output, persisted row, and monitor payload remain one tap away.

Open raw prompt and output audit trail

System Prompt

live_scout_system_prompt.md | 3367 bytes
You are a Talis Flash scout in a scale repair arm. Study only the assigned market cell: entity, horizon, lens, bias, evidence, prior strings, and allowed tools in the user packet.

Goal: emit exactly one top-level hypothesis that summarizes the strongest valid information_string, plus 1-2 decision-changing information_strings. Abstain only when every provided evidence packet is empty, stale for this horizon, or unsupported by the allowed sources.

Scale-repair rules:
- Do not leave `hypothesis` empty when `information_strings` is non-empty.
- Do not leave `information_strings` empty when at least one evidence packet is fresh enough to update a watchlist, verifier task, route decision, or gap repair.
- If the evidence is thin, write a low-conviction map string with a concrete missing-edge kill_signal rather than vague prose.
- Every string must include time_horizon, time_scale, observed_at, source_time_basis, expires_at, temporal_confidence, extends_or_contradicts, and would_change_decision=true.
- Every evidence_refs value must cite a provided tool_call_log_id or source ref. If none exists, abstain and say the missing source in rationale_brief.
- suggested_tools must be copied exactly from allowed_tool_candidates; if none are useful, return an empty list rather than inventing.
- No prose outside JSON. Keep JSON small.

Return strict JSON only:
{
  "hypothesis": "<falsifiable one-sentence claim, or empty string to abstain>",
  "confidence": 0.0,
  "rationale_brief": "<mechanism, max 180 chars>",
  "suggested_tools": ["<copy tic://... from allowed_tool_candidates>", "..."],
  "information_strings": [
    {
      "title": "<short title>",
      "thesis": "<entity -> mechanism -> market implication>",
      "entities_chain": ["<entity>", "<actor/venue/theme>"],
      "mechanism": "<why this should reprice or update the map>",
      "depth_layers": [{"layer": 1, "claim": "<direct effect>"}, {"layer": 2, "claim": "<second-order effect>"}],
      "expected_outcome": "<observable confirmation>",
      "time_horizon": "<tick|minute|hour|intraday|1d|1w|1m|structural>",
      "time_scale": "<same grain as claim>",
      "observed_at": "<ISO8601 source/tool observation time, or as_of_utc>",
      "source_time_basis": "<event_time|ingestion_time|publication_time|valid_time|unknown>",
      "kill_signal": "<what breaks the chain>",
      "extends_or_contradicts": "<new|extends|contradicts|abandons>",
      "would_change_decision": true,
      "expires_at": "<when stale>",
      "crowdedness": 0.0,
      "conviction": 0.0,
      "novelty_score": 0.0,
      "evidence_refs": ["<tool_call_log_id/source ref>"],
      "temporal_confidence": 0.0
    }
  ]
}

<market_evolve_prompt_contract>
contract_pressure: raise
minimum_information_strings: 2
This is an evolved policy requirement, not commentary. Before returning, self-check the JSON against it.
- Return at least 2 valid information_strings unless the cell is genuinely empty.
- Reject your own string if mechanism is missing or only narrative.
- Reject your own string if kill_signal is missing or not observable.
- Prefer evidence_refs/source refs from provided tool evidence; mark uncertainty instead of inventing refs.
- If you cannot satisfy this contract, return empty hypothesis/information_strings and explain the data gap in rationale_brief.
</market_evolve_prompt_contract>

User Prompt

live_scout_user_prompt.md | 2967 bytes
as_of_utc=2026-05-22T12:22:43.586741+00:00
Freshness rule: for intraday/1d/1w horizons, do not use old historical dates as live catalyst evidence unless explicitly labeled as regime context.

Cell:
  entity=kFLOKI
  horizon=1d
  lens=factor
  bias_mode=mean_reversion
  theme=hyperliquid_node_intelligence

tool_evidence:
  - tic://tool/builtin/query_timeseries@v1 ok=True tool_call_log_id=tc_1ee12ff6b80f45299d2d6aa9 summary={"anchor": "2026-05-22T12:22:42.266160+00:00", "as_of_query": null, "entity_symbol": "kFLOKI", "latest_age_s": 198656.47337, "latest_ts": "2026-05-20T05:11:45.792790+00:00", "lookback_hours": 168, "metric_prefix": "", "n_points": 6, "now": "2026-05-22T12:22:42.266160+00:00", "points": [{"metric": "predicted_funding_annual_pct__BinPerp", "source": "hl:predicted_funding/BinPerp", "ts": "2026-05-20T05:11:45.792790+00:00", "value": -27.5721, "value_jsonb": null}, {"metric": "predicted_funding_annual
  - tic://tool/builtin/query_source_health@v1 ok=True tool_call_log_id=tc_747f65b98b22426ba87a34af summary={"astro_cycles": {"consecutive_failures": 0, "current_status": "stale", "freshness_s": 198146.0, "last_attempted_at": "2026-05-20T05:20:16.310788+00:00", "last_error": null, "last_successful_at": "2026-05-20T05:20:16.310788+00:00", "n_failures_in_window": 0, "n_runs": 1, "rows_added_last": 0}, "bea_gdp_trade": {"consecutive_failures": 0, "current_status": "stale", "freshness_s": 197905.1, "last_attempted_at": "2026-05-20T05:24:17.162230+00:00", "last_error": null, "last_successful_at": "2026-05-
  - tic://tool/agent_native/find_similar_setups@v1 ok=True tool_call_log_id=tc_78b828b5a0284f9dbc6558ad summary={"entity_symbol": "kFLOKI", "matches": [], "metric": null, "mode": "shape", "quality_flags": ["no_metric_history"], "summary": "No usable metric history found for kFLOKI. Tried: auto and defaults.", "window_size": 24}
  - tic://tool/builtin/compute_float_absorption_rate@v1 ok=True tool_call_log_id=tc_bbe90bfa4ab64b98bdceb180 summary={"absorption_pct": null, "avg_buyer_concentration": null, "error": "no_candles_returned", "lookback_hours": 168, "net_buyer_count": 0, "quality_flags": ["insufficient_candles"], "symbol": "KFLOKI", "vs_baseline_z_score": null}

atlas_policy:
  Scouts may use any read-only approved atlas tool/source before the LLM call, under the evidence budget. The list below is the relevant subset already exposed for this cell; suggested_tools must copy from it exactly.


allowed_tool_candidates:
  tic://tool/builtin/query_timeseries@v1
  tic://tool/builtin/query_source_health@v1
  tic://tool/agent_native/find_similar_setups@v1
  tic://tool/builtin/compute_float_absorption_rate@v1
  tic://tool/builtin/compute_wallet_stats@v1
  tic://tool/builtin/solar_iv_regression@v1
  tic://tool/builtin/query_claims_by_entity@v1
  tic://tool/agent_native/find_confluence@v1
  tic://tool/agent_native/replay_artifact_reasoning@v1
  tic://tool/agent_native/semantic_search@v1

Return one JSON object only.

Coverage: builder_flow=1, hydromancer_leaderboard=2, market_state=3, node_reject_corpus=1, wallet_order_quality=1.\n\nalpha_geometry_route_contract:\n  {\"action\": \"replicate_with_independent_scouts\", \"cell_key\": \"HYPE|intraday|on_chain|frontier|node_intelligence\", \"global_shape\": {\"avg_fragility\": 0.0889, \"avg_frontier_pressure\": 0.6329, \"avg_source_independence\": 0.5556, \"avg_trade_scream_score\": 0.555, \"avg_verifier_readiness\": 0.8252, \"cell_count\": 3, \"route_directive_counts\": {\"widen_scouts\": 3}}, \"missing_edges\": [\"frontier_cell -> next_receptive_field\", \"thin_cell -> independent_replication\"], \"owner\": \"seed_router\", \"priority\": 0.5431, \"reason\": \"The cell is novel but still needs independent scout replication.\", \"route_directive\": \"widen_scouts\", \"route_task_id\": \"shape_task_bb962223b377\", \"source\": \"alpha_geometry_route\", \"source_cycle_id\": \"cycle_groundup_node_20260521\", \"success_gate\": \"second scout confirms, contradicts, or kills the string\", \"suggested_next_tools\": [\"tic://tool/builtin/query_events_recent@v1\", \"tic://tool/builtin/query_timeseries@v1\"]}\n\nshape_route_rules:\n  - This seed exists because the market map shape requested follow-up work.\n  - Use the native shape-reader evidence and the allowed tools to satisfy or falsify the success_gate.\n  - Your information_strings should explicitly change, confirm, contradict, or kill the missing_edges.\n  - If the edge cannot be moved with current tools, request the missing tool/source with expected_edge and eval_plan.\n\n\natlas_policy:\n  Scouts may use any read-only approved atlas tool/source before the LLM call, under the evidence budget. The list below is the relevant subset already exposed for this cell; suggested_tools must copy from it exactly.\n\n\nallowed_tool_candidates:\n  tic://tool/talis_native/plan_alpha_geometry_actions@v1\n  tic://tool/builtin/query_events_recent@v1\n  tic://tool/builtin/query_timeseries@v1\n  tic://tool/learned/hl_node_stream_reader@v1\n\nReturn one JSON object only.",

    "completion_model": {
      "full_map_requirement": [
        "Every valid cell has a coverage_log row with freshness and outcome state.",
        "Every active theme has dedicated cells across affected entities and horizons.",
        "Every geometry route directive is either consumed by a later seed or explicitly expired.",
        "Every high-value data surface has at least one live receipt path or a tool proposal explaining the gap.",
        "Coverage dashboards show blind zones, stale zones, crowded zones, and frontier zones separately."
      ],
      "honest_claim": "One 1,000-scout cycle is strategic coverage, not mathematical proof that every market state was exhausted.",
      "proof_artifacts": [
        "seed_manifest.json for generated cells",
        "coverage_log table",
        "tool_atlas retrieval receipts",
        "information_geometry_snapshots",
        "system_trace.json"
      ]
    },

    "routing_overlays": [
      {
        "effect": "recently covered cells with no downstream publish are downweighted",
        "name": "coverage penalty",
        "source": "coverage_log"
      },
      {
        "effect": "sparse/frontier regions are oversampled, dense consensus regions are underweighted",
        "name": "topology frontier boost",
        "source": "topology_density_map"
      },
      {
        "effect": "verify, repair, resolve-tension, widen-source, and widen-scout cells get explicit next-cycle scouts",
        "name": "alpha-geometry route seeds",
        "source": "information_geometry_snapshots from the prior cycle"
      },
      {
        "effect": "must-research event cells are prepended before the normal random budget",
        "name": "calendar gate",
        "source": "calendar_gate / catalyst clock"
      },
      {
        "effect": "each seed receives lexical candidates plus dynamic tool/source matches for its query text",
        "name": "BM25 tool retrieval",
        "source": "tool_atlas"
      }
    ],
    "sampling_policy": {
      "base_sampler": "Latin hypercube over valid entity x horizon x lens x bias cells",
      "default_seed_budget": 1000,
      "determinism": "rng_seed can make the slice replayable; otherwise cycle/scope time seeds the generator",
      "stratified_budget": "900 broad-market scouts before calendar/geometry injections",
      "theme_injection": "100 dedicated theme scouts when themes exist"
    },
    "status": "available",
    "validity": {
      "rule": "asset-class gates remove nonsensical lenses before sampling",
      "valid_cell_count": 132048,
      "valid_counts_by_asset_class": {
        "equity": 13104,
        "hyperliquid_perp": 115920,
        "index_macro": 3024
      }
    }
